title: Engineering Manager
description:
About Us:
Buildo Engineering PTE LTD is a leading supplier of green and sustainable construction materials, including Autoclaved Aerated Lightweight Concrete (ALC) panels and cork products. We are committed to delivering high-quality materials and technical support to our clients, enabling sustainable construction solutions across Singapore.

Job Summary:
We are seeking an experienced and motivated Engineering Manager to lead our engineering team and oversee technical operations. The ideal candidate will have strong project management skills, technical expertise in construction materials, and a passion for sustainable building solutions.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Lead, manage, and mentor the engineering team to ensure project efficiency and high-quality deliverables.

  • Oversee technical operations, including material delivery, quality control, and technical support for contractors.

  • Develop and implement engineering processes and best practices to optimize workflow and improve project outcomes.

  • Collaborate with clients, contractors, and internal teams to ensure technical requirements are met.

  • Ensure compliance with safety standards, regulatory requirements, and environmental guidelines.

  • Provide technical guidance and support for new product development and sustainable construction solutions.

  • Prepare reports, proposals, and documentation for projects and technical approvals.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Construction Management, or related field.

  • Minimum of 5 years of experience in construction materials, project management, or engineering operations.

  • Strong knowledge of ALC panels, cork products, or other sustainable building materials is an advantage.

  • Excellent leadership, organizational, and problem-solving skills.

  • Effective communication and interpersonal skills.

  • Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously and meet deadlines.

postedCompany.description:
Buildo Engineering is the leading Autoclaved Aerated Lightweight Concrete (ALC) reinforced panel supplier in terms of product quality, design and solution, technical support and services. We actively promote green architecture and advocate low-carbon life. Because of its low density, our product not only features low raw material consumption, but also helps reduce carbon emissions during transportation and installation processes. The superior performance of ALC’s high thermal insulation, fire resistance, water resistance and lightweight, make it a very Green and Sustainable product.

Buildo also promotes Cork-based thermal and acoustic plaster and screed. Cork has excellent thermal insulating properties and is known for its ability to absorb sound vibrations and dampens sound, making it an ideal material for both thermal and acoustic applications. Promoting cork-based thermal and acoustic plaster not only offers practical benefits but also aligns with sustainability goals, as cork is a renewable resource that can be harvested without harming the cork oak trees. It's a great example of innovative and eco-friendly building materials being utilized to enhance both comfort and environmental responsibility.
postedCompany.name: BUILDO ENGINEERING PTE. LTD.
